ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age group of the individual (e.g., 20s, 30s, 40s) */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the work class of the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the individual */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country of the individual */,
  "income_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income class of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual (e.g., Hispanic, Non-Hispanic) */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individual (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Veteran status of the individual (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Size of the individual's household */,
  "household_income" TEXT /* Income of the individual's household */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_class_id") REFERENCES income_classes ("income_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., State-gov, Private, Local-gov) */,
  "workclass_description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, Some-college, Doctorate) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., high school, bachelor's degree, master's degree) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial, Prof-specialty) */,
  "occupation_category" TEXT /* Occupation category (e.g., management, sales, technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Married, Single, Divorced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country (e.g., United States, Mexico, Canada) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_classes" (
  "income_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income class */,
  "income_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the income class (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Census, Survey, Administrative records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset (e.g., Demographic Data, Socioeconomic Data) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Admin, Researcher, Analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
